nodes.name: 喜燕
nodes.summary: 喜燕，拉丁文学名为 Hirundo Neoxena，中文正式名为迎燕，别名欢迎燕。原产地为澳大利亚、新西兰，以及附近岛屿。迎燕是燕科的一种小型雀鸟。它于二十世纪中叶迁徙进入新西兰。它与通常被认为是同种的太平洋燕子非常相似。 喜燕最早在約翰·古爾德（John Gould）的《澳洲鳥類》（The birds of Australia）書中被描述。喜燕會與人類比鄰而居，在建築物的牆上銜泥作巢。一對喜燕交配後會產下三至五個蛋。母燕會一直守候著蛋至少二至三個星期。小燕子出生時，由雙親餵養，在二至三個星期後就能離開巢穴。 圖片 參考文獻

nodes.name: Hirundo
nodes.summary: Hirundo（Hirundo）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联16种鸟类，如Blue swallow、Black-and-rufous swallow、Pied-winged swallow等16种鸟类。

nodes.name: 美拉尼西亚
nodes.summary: 美拉尼西亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Stephan's emerald dove、Blyth's hornbill、Sacred kingfisher等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 约翰·古尔德
nodes.summary: 约翰·古尔德是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联71种鸟类，包括绿棉凫、凍原豆雁、黄腹角雉等71种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The welcome swallow (Hirundo neoxena) is a small passerine bird in the swallow family Hirundinidae that is native to Australia and nearby islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The welcome swallow (Hirundo neoxena) is a small passerine bird in the swallow family Hirundinidae that is native to Australia and nearby islands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Although welcome swallows are more often near coastal and wetland areas, they can live in almost all types of habitat, except alpine areas and very dense forest. They have been documented in open areas such as farmlands, grasslands, partly cleared areas that are wooded, lands associated with bodies of water such as lakes or reservoirs, and along coastlines. This species is well-adapted for urban and suburban life as well; it is even able to live in high altitude areas due to the provision of nesting materials provided by humans. During winter, welcome swallows move to a warmer habitat which can provide them enough food and safe shelter.{{cite book | editor1-last=Higgins | editor1-first=P.J
